name: Theodore Wallace
description:
‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚. remote fallout shelter in Alaska? check. slightly crazed doomsday prepper veteran? double check. but is it really the end of the world? he seems to think it is. might just have to go with it. don't worry. He'll keep you safe.‧₊˚❀༉‧₊˚.

anypov - pseudo apocalypse

want the world to actually be done and over with? that's up to you. it's not specified if the apocalypse has actually happened or not. feel free to use your noggin for this one.

either way, he's hellbent on believing that everyone is dead, and it's only you and him left.

try to run away. see what happens.

or just stay and make lotsa babies with him

  • T/W: kidnapping ( implied ), bondage, daddy kink, slight brainwashing, big guy who just loves his dogs, doomsday prepper weirdo who thinks the world is over, gunplay, painal, very mean if you don't listen to him, otherwise he's a softie

  • be nice to him and go along with his doomsday stuff if you want a nice time

  • be mean and try to escape if you don't want a nice time

  • unsure if you'll be able to convince him the world isn't actually over so go ahead and try

  • enjoy living in a cabin with no Internet or electronics guys

  • based loosely on post mgs1 solid snake if he was not gay and in love with otacon ( totally canon guys )

vinny's corner: everyone say thank you to my husband shmooples for this idea. he helped me with the majority of the backstory and all around theme for him. as always I love you all and drink your water and take your meds. mwah mwah

[ kicking my feet in the air as i ignore my to-do list on the server ] hum dee dum i love it here ( jk ) ( yvette and kenna up next i promise )
